name: Illidan
description: A mobile, sustained damage Assassin who pairs well with Heroes that can enable him.
title: The Betrayer
info: Illidan Stormrage, the first demon hunter, betrayed his people and created a new Well of Eternity after the demonic invasion of Azeroth. Now Illidan lords over Outland slaying unsuitably prepared Heroes who venture into his domain.

Illidan.name: Dive
Illidan.description: Dive at the target, dealing 66 (+4% per level) damage and flipping to the other side of the target.

Illidan.name: Sweeping Strike
Illidan.description: Dash towards target point, dealing 119 (+4% per level) damage to enemies along the way. Hitting an enemy increases Illidan's Basic Attack damage by 35% for 3 seconds.

Illidan.name: Evasion
Illidan.description: Evade enemy Basic Attacks for 2.5 seconds.

Illidan.name: The Hunt
Illidan.description: Charge to target unit, dealing 251 (+4% per level) damage on impact and stunning for 1 second.

Illidan.name: Metamorphosis
Illidan.description: Transform into Demon Form at the target location, dealing 46 (+4% per level) damage in the area. Temporarily increases maximum Health by 220 (+4% per level) for each Hero hit by the initial impact. Lasts for 18 seconds.

Illidan.name: Betrayer's Thirst
Illidan.description: Basic Attacks heal for 30% of damage dealt and reduce Ability cooldowns by 1 second.

1.name: Immolation
1.description: After using Sweeping Strike, burn nearby enemies for 22 (+4% per level) damage a second for 4 seconds.

1.name: Battered Assault
1.description: Increase Sweeping Strike's Basic Attack damage bonus duration from 3 to 5 seconds. If Sweeping Strike hits 2 Heroes its damage bonus is increased from 35% to 125%.

1.name: Unending Hatred
1.description: Quest: Minion kills grant 0.2 Basic Attack Damage. Hero Takedowns grant 1 Basic Attack Damage.  Reward: After gaining 20 increased Basic Attack Damage, receive an additional 20 Basic Attack Damage.

4.name: Reflexive Block
4.description: Using Dive grants 75 Physical Armor against the next 3 Hero Basic Attacks for 4 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 75%.

4.name: Thirsting Blade
4.description: Betrayer's Thirst's healing from Basic Attacks is increased from 30% to 50% while Sweeping Strike's damage bonus is active.

4.name: Hunter's Onslaught
4.description: Basic Abilities heal for 35% of the damage they deal. This bonus is doubled versus Heroes.

7.name: Rapid Chase
7.description: Dive grants 20% Movement Speed for 3 seconds. If the target is an enemy Hero, reduce its cooldown by 1 second.

7.name: Friend or Foe
7.description: Increases the range of Dive by 20% and allows it to be used to dive to allied Heroes.

7.name: Unbound
7.description: Sweeping Strike can go over walls and terrain.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes with Sweeping Strike, gain a second charge.

10.name: Metamorphosis
10.description: Transform into Demon Form at the target location, dealing 46 (+4% per level) damage in the area. Temporarily increases maximum Health by 220 (+4% per level) for each Hero hit by the initial impact. Lasts for 18 seconds.

10.name: The Hunt
10.description: Charge to target unit, dealing 251 (+4% per level) damage on impact and stunning for 1 second.

13.name: Nimble Defender
13.description: If Sweeping Strike hits an enemy Hero, gain 25 Armor for 2 seconds, reducing damage taken by 25%.

13.name: Elusive Strike
13.description: Sweeping Strike reduces the cooldown of Evasion by 3 seconds every time it damages an enemy Hero.

13.name: Sixth Sense
13.description: While active, Evasion grants Illidan 75 Spell Armor against the next 2 sources of Spell Damage, reducing their damage by 75%.

16.name: Marked for Death
16.description: Dive deals an extra 180 (+4% per level) damage if used consecutively on a target within 10 seconds.

16.name: Fiery Brand
16.description: Every 3rd attack against the same Hero deals an additional 7% of their maximum Health as damage.

16.name: Blades of Azzinoth
16.description: Hitting 5 Heroes with Sweeping Strike allows Blades of Azzinoth to be activated, increasing Basic Attack damage by 75% for 8 seconds.

20.name: Demonic Form
20.description: Permanently remain in Demonic Form. Metamorphosis also increases Attack Speed by 20% and reduces the duration of Stuns, Roots, and Slows by 50%. Illidan can now mount in Demonic Form.

20.name: Nowhere to Hide
20.description: The Hunt gains unlimited range. Illidan passively reveals enemy Heroes below 25% Health anywhere on the Battleground.

20.name: Nexus Blades
20.description: Basic Attacks deal 20% more damage and Slow enemy Movement Speed by 20% for 1 second.

20.name: Bolt of the Storm
20.description: Activate to teleport to a nearby location.

tooltipMarkup.GenericBoltoftheStormTalent: Activate to teleport to a nearby location.
tooltipMarkup.IllidanBetrayersThirst: Basic Attacks heal for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanBetrayersThirstLifesteal,Modification.VitalDamageLeechArray[Life].KindArray[Basic]*100"/>%</c> of damage dealt and reduce Ability cooldowns by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.
tooltipMarkup.IllidanBetrayersThirstHuntersOnslaughtTa: Basic Abilities heal for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanHuntersOnslaughtLifeLeech,Modification.VitalDamageLeechArray[Life].KindArray[Ability]*100" precision="2"/>%</c> of the damage they deal. This bonus is doubled versus Heroes.
tooltipMarkup.IllidanBetrayersThirstThirstingBladeTale: Betrayer's Thirst's healing from Basic Attacks is increased from <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanBetrayersThirstLifesteal,Modification.VitalDamageLeechArray[Life].KindArray[Basic]*100"/>%</c> to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanBetrayersThirstThirstingBladeTalent,Modification.VitalDamageLeechArray[Life].KindArray[Basic]*100"/>%</c> while Sweeping Strike's damage bonus is active.
tooltipMarkup.IllidanBladesOfAzzinoth: Hitting <c val="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> Heroes with Sweeping Strike allows Blades of Azzinoth to be activated, increasing Basic Attack damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,IllidanBladesOfAzzinoth,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic]"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanBladesOfAzzinoth,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.IllidanDive: Dive at the target, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,IllidanDiveDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and flipping to the other side of the target.
tooltipMarkup.IllidanDiveFriendOrFoeTalent: Increases the range of Dive by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,IllidanMasteryFriendOrFoeDive,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value/Abil,IllidanDive,Range"player="0"precision="0"/>%</c> and allows it to be used to dive to allied Heroes.
tooltipMarkup.IllidanDiveMarkedForDeathTalent: Dive deals an extra <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,IllidanDiveMarkedForDeathTalentDamage,Amount-Effect,IllidanDiveDamage,Amount"/></c> damage if used consecutively on a target within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanDiveMarkedForDeathBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.IllidanDiveRapidChaseTalent: Dive grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanDiveRapidChaseBehavior,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor * 100"/>%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanDiveRapidChaseBehavior,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds. If the target is an enemy Hero, reduce its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,IllidanDiveRapidChaseCooldownReduction,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.IllidanElusiveStrike: Sweeping Strike reduces the cooldown of Evasion by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-1*Effect,IllidanEvasionRefeshingStrikeTalentModifyUnit,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"precision="1"/></c> seconds every time it damages an enemy Hero.
tooltipMarkup.IllidanEvasion: Evade enemy Basic Attacks for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanEvasion,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.IllidanEvasionReflexiveBlockTalent: Using Dive grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TalentBucketBlock,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Basic]"/></c> Physical Armor against the next <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,IllidanDiveApplyReflexiveBlockTalentStacks,Count"/></c> Hero Basic Attacks for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,IllidanDiveApplyReflexiveBlockTalentStacks,Duration"/></c> seconds, reducing the damage taken by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TalentBucketBlock,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Basic]"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.IllidanEvasionSixthSenseTalent: While active, Evasion grants Illidan <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanSixthSenseStack,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/></c> Spell Armor against the next <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,IllidanEvasionApplySixthSenseTalentStacks,Count"/></c> sources of Spell Damage, reducing their damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanSixthSenseStack,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.IllidanFieryBrand: Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Validator,IllidanHas2StacksFieryBrandTarget,Value+1"/>rd</c> attack against the same Hero deals an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,IllidanFieryBrandDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]"/>%</c> of their maximum Health as damage.
tooltipMarkup.IllidanMetamorphosis: Transform into Demon Form at the target location, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NewMetamorphosisDamage,Amount"/></c> damage in the area. Temporarily increases maximum Health by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanMetamorphosisBonusHealthScaler,Modification.VitalMaxArray[Life]"/></c> for each Hero hit by the initial impact. Lasts for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">18</c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.IllidanMetamorphosisDemonicFormTalent: Permanently remain in Demonic Form. Metamorphosis also increases Attack Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> and reduces the duration of Stuns, Roots, and Slows by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>. Illidan can now mount in Demonic Form.
tooltipMarkup.IllidanNimbleDefender: If Sweeping Strike hits an enemy Hero, gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanSweepingStrikeNimbleDefenderArmorIncrease,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanSweepingStrikeNimbleDefenderArmorIncrease,Duration"/></c> seconds, reducing damage taken by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanSweepingStrikeNimbleDefenderArmorIncrease,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.IllidanSweepingStrike: Dash towards target point, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,IllidanSweepingStrikeDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies along the way. Hitting an enemy increases Illidan's Basic Attack damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanSweepingStrikesDamageBuffNoStacking,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic]*100" player="0"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanSweepingStrikesDamageBuffNoStacking,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.IllidanSweepingStrikeBatteredAssaultTale: Increase Sweeping Strike's Basic Attack damage bonus duration from <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanSweepingStrikesDamageBuffNoStacking,Duration" player="0"/></c> to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanSweepingStrikesDamageBuffNoStacking,Duration+Talent,IllidanMasteryBatteredAssaultSweepingStrike,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value" player="0"/></c> seconds. If Sweeping Strike hits <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> Heroes its damage bonus is increased from <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanSweepingStrikesDamageBuffNoStacking,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic]*100"/>%</c> to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,IllidanSweepingStrikesDamageBuffNoStackingBatteredAssault,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic]"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.IllidanSweepingStrikeImmolationTalent: After using Sweeping Strike, burn nearby enemies for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,IllidanSweepingStrikesImmolationDamage,Amount"/></c> damage a second for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanSweepingStrikesImmolation,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.IllidanSweepingStrikeUnboundTalent: Sweeping Strike can go over walls and terrain.Reward: After hitting Heroes with Sweeping Strike, gain a second charge.
tooltipMarkup.IllidanTheHunt: Charge to target unit, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,IllidanTheHuntDamage,Amount"/></c> damage on impact and stunning for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanTheHuntStun,Duration" player="0"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.IllidanTheHuntNowhereToHideTalent: The Hunt gains unlimited range. Illidan passively reveals enemy Heroes below <c val="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> Health anywhere on the Battleground.
tooltipMarkup.IllidanUnendingHatredTalent: Quest: Minion kills grant Basic Attack Damage. Hero Takedowns grant Basic Attack Damage.Reward: After gaining increased Basic Attack Damage, receive an additional Basic Attack Damage.
tooltipMarkup.NexusBladesTalent: Basic Attacks deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,NexusBladesCarryBehavior,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic]"/>%</c> more damage and Slow enemy Movement Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,NexusBladesSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusBladesSlow,Duration" player="0"/></c> second.
